import io
import string
import list

fn is_space(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut token = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i <= n
    mut is_sep = false
    if i == n
      is_sep = true
    else
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        if is_space(b)
          is_sep = true
        end
      when None
        is_sep = true
      end
    end
    if is_sep
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        token = ""
      end
    else
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn format_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end

fn read_required_line() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = read_required_line()
  let line2 = read_required_line()
  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  let threshold = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  mut filtered: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = nums.len()
  while i < n
    match nums.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if v > threshold
        filtered = list.push(filtered, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(format_list(filtered))
end
